# Step 12: WGCNA

## 12.1 模块划分与模块-分组相关性

```{r}
de_result <- restore_main_de_result(required = TRUE)

ensure_module_result_layout("12_wgcna")

wgcna_use_full_snapshot <- tolower(Sys.getenv("WGCNA_USE_FULL_SNAPSHOT", "false")) %in% c("1", "true", "yes")
coexp_expr <- if (wgcna_use_full_snapshot) {
  if (!is.null(gene_logcpm_full)) gene_logcpm_full else gene_exp_full
} else {
  if (!is.null(gene_logcpm)) gene_logcpm else gene_exp
}
coexp_is_log_scale <- if (wgcna_use_full_snapshot) !is.null(gene_logcpm_full) else !is.null(gene_logcpm)
coexp_info <- if (wgcna_use_full_snapshot) full_sample_info else sample_info
coexp_source_label <- if (wgcna_use_full_snapshot) "full_sample_snapshot" else "selected_samples"
coexp_enabled <- !is.null(coexp_expr) && ncol(coexp_expr) >= 12
cat("WGCNA 是否启用：", coexp_enabled, "\n")
cat("WGCNA 输入样本集：", coexp_source_label, " (n=", ncol(coexp_expr), ")\n", sep = "")
if (!coexp_enabled) {
  cat("提示：当前 WGCNA 输入样本数少于 12，按项目规则跳过 WGCNA。\n")
}

module_df_annotated <- data.frame()
module_trait_tbl <- data.frame()
module_hub_tbl <- data.frame()

if (coexp_enabled) {
  tryCatch({
    allowWGCNAThreads()
    cor <- WGCNA::cor

    network_expr <- if (coexp_is_log_scale) coexp_expr else log2(coexp_expr + 1)
    keep_genes <- select_top_variable_genes(network_expr, top_n = 3000)
    network_expr <- network_expr[keep_genes, , drop = FALSE]

    good <- goodSamplesGenes(t(network_expr), verbose = 0)
    if (!good$allOK) {
      network_expr <- network_expr[good$goodGenes, good$goodSamples, drop = FALSE]
    }

    powers <- c(1:10, 12, 14)
    sft <- pickSoftThreshold(t(network_expr), powerVector = powers, verbose = 0, networkType = "unsigned")
    sft_df <- data.frame(
      Power = powers,
      SFT_R2 = sft$fitIndices[, 2],
      MeanConnectivity = sft$fitIndices[, 5]
    )
    write.csv(sft_df, "result/12_wgcna/12_0_soft_threshold_table.csv", row.names = FALSE)

    chosen_power <- sft_df$Power[which(sft_df$SFT_R2 >= 0.8)][1]
    if (is.na(chosen_power)) {
      chosen_power <- sft_df$Power[which.max(sft_df$SFT_R2)]
    }
    chosen_power <- chosen_power %||% 6

    soft_plot <- ggplot(sft_df, aes(Power, SFT_R2)) +
      geom_line(color = viz_pal$sig_gradient["low"]) +
      geom_point(size = 2.5, color = viz_pal$sig_gradient["high"]) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0.8, linetype = "dashed", color = viz_pal$neutral["dark"]) +
      scale_x_continuous(breaks = powers) +
      labs(title = "WGCNA: Soft Threshold Selection", y = "Scale-free fit (R^2)") +
      theme_rnaseq_minimal()
    save_plot_versions(
      soft_plot,
      primary = "result/12_wgcna/12_1_WGCNA_Soft_Threshold_Selection.pdf",
      width = 8,
      height = 5
    )

    module_min_size <- max(30, floor(nrow(network_expr) / 25))
    net <- blockwiseModules(
      t(network_expr),
      power = chosen_power,
      TOMType = "unsigned",
      minModuleSize = module_min_size,
      reassignThreshold = 0,
      mergeCutHeight = 0.25,
      numericLabels = TRUE,
      pamRespectsDendro = FALSE,
      saveTOMs = FALSE,
      verbose = 0
    )

    module_colors <- labels2colors(net$colors)
    module_df <- data.frame(
      gene_id = rownames(network_expr),
      module_color = module_colors,
      module_label = paste0("Module_", module_colors),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )

    anno <- de_result %>%
      dplyr::select(gene_id, ensembl_id, gene_label, ENTREZID, log2FoldChange, pvalue, direction) %>%
      distinct(gene_id, .keep_all = TRUE)
    module_df_annotated <- module_df %>% left_join(anno, by = "gene_id")
    write.csv(module_df_annotated, "result/12_wgcna/12_2_WGCNA_Module_Assignment.csv", row.names = FALSE)

    MEs <- as.data.frame(net$MEs)
    rownames(MEs) <- rownames(net$MEs)
    me_module_colors <- labels2colors(as.integer(sub("^ME", "", colnames(MEs))))
    colnames(MEs) <- paste0("Module_", me_module_colors)
    me_df <- as.data.frame(MEs)
    rownames(me_df) <- rownames(MEs)
    me_df$sample <- rownames(me_df)
    me_df$group <- coexp_info[me_df$sample, "group"]
    write.csv(me_df, "result/12_wgcna/12_3b_Module_Eigengene_Table.csv", row.names = FALSE)

    eigengene_long <- me_df %>%
      pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("Module_"), names_to = "Module", values_to = "Eigengene") %>%
      mutate(Sample = factor(sample, levels = rownames(MEs)))

    module_palette <- unique(sub("^Module_", "", eigengene_long$Module))
    names(module_palette) <- unique(eigengene_long$Module)
    group_shape_values <- c(16, 17, 15, 18, 8, 7)
    names(group_shape_values) <- unique(me_df$group)
    group_shape_values <- group_shape_values[unique(me_df$group)]
    eigengene_plot <- ggplot(eigengene_long, aes(x = Sample, y = Eigengene, color = Module, group = Module)) +
      geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
      geom_point(aes(shape = group), size = 2.2) +
      facet_wrap(~ Module, scales = "free_y", ncol = min(3, length(unique(eigengene_long$Module)))) +
      scale_color_manual(values = module_palette) +
      scale_shape_manual(values = group_shape_values) +
      labs(title = "WGCNA: Module Eigengenes", y = "Scaled eigengene", x = NULL) +
      theme_rnaseq_minimal() +
      theme(legend.position = "top", axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
    save_plot_versions(
      eigengene_plot,
      primary = "result/12_wgcna/12_3_WGCNA_Module_Eigengenes.pdf",
      width = 11,
      height = max(5, 3 * ceiling(length(unique(eigengene_long$Module)) / 3))
    )

    trait <- as.numeric(coexp_info[rownames(MEs), "group"] == group2_label)
    module_trait_cor <- stats::cor(MEs, trait, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
    module_trait_p <- WGCNA::corPvalueStudent(module_trait_cor, nSamples = nrow(MEs))
    module_trait_tbl <- data.frame(
      Module = rownames(module_trait_cor),
      correlation = as.numeric(module_trait_cor[, 1]),
      pvalue = as.numeric(module_trait_p[, 1]),
      module_size = as.numeric(table(module_df$module_label)[rownames(module_trait_cor)]),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    ) %>%
      arrange(desc(abs(correlation)))
    write.csv(module_trait_tbl, "result/12_wgcna/12_4_Module_Trait_Correlation.csv", row.names = FALSE)

    module_trait_plot <- module_trait_tbl %>%
      mutate(Module = factor(Module, levels = rev(Module)),
             label = sprintf("%.2f\np=%.3g", correlation, pvalue)) %>%
      ggplot(aes(x = paste0(group2_label, "_vs_", group1_label), y = Module, fill = correlation)) +
      geom_tile(color = viz_pal$neutral["light"]) +
      geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3) +
      scale_fill_heatmap_diverging(midpoint = 0) +
      labs(title = "模块与分组的相关性", x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = "Correlation") +
      theme_rnaseq_minimal()
    save_plot_versions(
      module_trait_plot,
      primary = "result/12_wgcna/12_5_Module_Trait_Heatmap.pdf",
      width = 6,
      height = max(4, 0.8 * nrow(module_trait_tbl))
    )

    module_universe <- unique(module_df_annotated$gene_id)
    sig_de_ids <- intersect(unique(de_result$gene_id[de_result$direction != "ns"]), module_universe)

    if (length(sig_de_ids) > 0) {
      module_de_enrichment <- bind_rows(lapply(sort(unique(module_df_annotated$module_label)), function(one_module) {
        module_genes <- unique(module_df_annotated$gene_id[module_df_annotated$module_label == one_module])
        in_module_sig <- sum(module_genes %in% sig_de_ids)
        in_module_non_sig <- length(module_genes) - in_module_sig
        out_module_sig <- length(sig_de_ids) - in_module_sig
        out_module_non_sig <- length(module_universe) - length(module_genes) - out_module_sig
        fisher_res <- fisher.test(matrix(c(in_module_sig, in_module_non_sig, out_module_sig, out_module_non_sig), nrow = 2), alternative = "greater")
        bg_ratio <- length(sig_de_ids) / length(module_universe)
        module_ratio <- if (length(module_genes) > 0) in_module_sig / length(module_genes) else 0
        data.frame(
          Module = one_module,
          module_size = length(module_genes),
          sig_de_in_module = in_module_sig,
          sig_de_ratio = module_ratio,
          background_ratio = bg_ratio,
          fold_enrichment = ifelse(bg_ratio > 0, module_ratio / bg_ratio, NA_real_),
          odds_ratio = unname(fisher_res$estimate),
          pvalue = fisher_res$p.value,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
      })) %>%
        left_join(
          module_trait_tbl %>%
            dplyr::select(Module, module_trait_correlation = correlation, module_trait_pvalue = pvalue),
          by = "Module"
        ) %>%
        arrange(pvalue, desc(fold_enrichment))
      write.csv(module_de_enrichment, "result/12_wgcna/12_6_Module_DE_Enrichment.csv", row.names = FALSE)
      module_de_plot <- ggplot(module_de_enrichment, aes(x = module_trait_correlation, y = reorder(Module, module_trait_correlation), size = sig_de_in_module, color = -log10(pvalue + 1e-300))) +
        geom_point(alpha = 0.85) +
        scale_color_heatmap_sequential() +
        labs(title = "模块-分组相关性与 DE 富集整合", x = "Module-trait correlation", y = NULL, size = "Sig DE genes", color = "-log10(pvalue)") +
        theme_rnaseq_bw()
      save_plot_versions(
        module_de_plot,
        primary = "result/12_wgcna/12_7_Module_DE_Enrichment_Bubble.pdf",
        width = 8,
        height = max(4.5, 0.8 * nrow(module_de_enrichment))
      )
    }

    module_names <- colnames(me_df)[grepl("^Module_", colnames(me_df))]
    hub_tbl <- bind_rows(lapply(module_names, function(one_module) {
      member_genes <- rownames(network_expr)[paste0("Module_", module_colors) == one_module]
      if (length(member_genes) == 0) {
        return(NULL)
      }
      kme <- vapply(member_genes, function(one_gene) {
        safe_cor(as.numeric(network_expr[one_gene, ]), as.numeric(me_df[match(colnames(network_expr), me_df$sample), one_module]))
      }, numeric(1))
      data.frame(
        gene_id = member_genes,
        Module = one_module,
        kME = kme,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }))

    if (!is.null(hub_tbl) && nrow(hub_tbl) > 0) {
      hub_tbl <- hub_tbl %>% left_join(anno, by = "gene_id")
      module_hub_tbl <- hub_tbl
      hub_tbl <- hub_tbl %>% arrange(Module, desc(abs(kME)))
      write.csv(hub_tbl, "result/12_wgcna/12_8_Module_Hub_Genes.csv", row.names = FALSE)

      top_hubs <- hub_tbl %>%
        group_by(Module) %>%
        slice_max(order_by = abs(kME), n = 10, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
        ungroup() %>%
        mutate(gene_label_plot = dplyr::coalesce(gene_label, gene_id))

      hub_plot <- ggplot(top_hubs, aes(x = reorder(gene_label_plot, abs(kME)), y = abs(kME), fill = Module)) +
        geom_col(width = 0.75) +
        coord_flip() +
        facet_wrap(~ Module, scales = "free_y") +
        labs(title = "各模块 Top hub genes", x = NULL, y = "|kME|") +
        theme_rnaseq_minimal() +
        theme(legend.position = "none")
      save_plot_versions(
        hub_plot,
        primary = "result/12_wgcna/12_9_Module_Hub_Genes.pdf",
        width = 11,
        height = max(6, 3 * ceiling(length(unique(top_hubs$Module)) / 2))
      )
    }
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("WGCNA 整合分析跳过：", e$message)
  })
} else {
  cat("WGCNA 输入样本数不足（<12），跳过 WGCNA。\n")
}

if (!exists("me_df") || is.null(me_df)) {
  me_df <- data.frame()
}

module_pathway_ora <- data.frame()
if (is.data.frame(module_df_annotated) && nrow(module_df_annotated) > 0 && "ENTREZID" %in% colnames(module_df_annotated)) {
  module_universe_entrez <- unique(as.character(stats::na.omit(module_df_annotated$ENTREZID)))
  module_universe_entrez <- module_universe_entrez[module_universe_entrez != ""]
  module_pathway_ora <- bind_rows(lapply(sort(unique(module_df_annotated$module_label)), function(one_module) {
    module_tbl <- module_df_annotated %>% filter(module_label == one_module)
    module_entrez <- unique(stats::na.omit(module_tbl$ENTREZID))
    module_entrez <- module_entrez[module_entrez != ""]
    if (length(module_entrez) < 10) {
      return(data.frame())
    }
    go_res <- run_clusterprofiler_with_retry(
      label = paste("WGCNA module GO BP ORA", one_module),
      fn = function() enrichGO(module_entrez, OrgDb = annotation_orgdb, keyType = "ENTREZID", ont = "BP", universe = module_universe_entrez, pvalueCutoff = 1, qvalueCutoff = 1, readable = TRUE),
      attempts = 2,
      sleep_seconds = 2,
      must_succeed = FALSE
    )
    kegg_res <- run_clusterprofiler_with_retry(
      label = paste("WGCNA module KEGG ORA", one_module),
      fn = function() enrichKEGG(gene = module_entrez, universe = module_universe_entrez, organism = kegg_organism_code, pvalueCutoff = 1, qvalueCutoff = 1),
      attempts = 2,
      sleep_seconds = 2,
      must_succeed = FALSE,
      timeout_seconds = 120
    )
    if (nrow(make_result_df(kegg_res)) > 0) {
      kegg_res <- tryCatch(setReadable(kegg_res, OrgDb = annotation_orgdb, keyType = "ENTREZID"), error = function(e) kegg_res)
    }
    bind_rows(
      make_result_df(go_res) %>% mutate(source = "GO_BP"),
      make_result_df(kegg_res) %>% mutate(source = "KEGG")
    ) %>%
      # 保留当前项目 nominal pvalue < 0.05 的模块通路富集展示口径；正式报告建议同步查看 p.adjust/qvalue。
      filter(is.finite(pvalue), pvalue < 0.05) %>%
      mutate(
        Module = one_module,
        module_size = nrow(module_tbl),
        module_trait_correlation = module_trait_tbl$correlation[match(one_module, module_trait_tbl$Module)],
        module_trait_pvalue = module_trait_tbl$pvalue[match(one_module, module_trait_tbl$Module)]
      )
  })) %>%
    arrange(pvalue, desc(abs(module_trait_correlation)))
} else {
  module_pathway_ora <- data.frame(status = "skipped_wgcna_module_annotation_unavailable")
}
write.csv(module_pathway_ora, "result/12_wgcna/12_10_Module_Pathway_ORA.csv", row.names = FALSE)

if (nrow(module_pathway_ora) > 0 && all(c("Module", "Description", "pvalue", "source") %in% colnames(module_pathway_ora))) {
  module_pathway_plot_tbl <- module_pathway_ora %>%
    group_by(Module, source) %>%
    arrange(pvalue, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    slice_head(n = 5) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(pathway_label = factor(Description, levels = rev(unique(Description))))
  module_pathway_plot <- ggplot(module_pathway_plot_tbl, aes(x = module_trait_correlation, y = pathway_label, size = Count, color = -log10(pvalue + 1e-300))) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.85) +
    facet_grid(source ~ Module, scales = "free_y", space = "free_y") +
    scale_color_heatmap_sequential() +
    labs(title = "WGCNA 模块通路富集", x = "Module-trait correlation", y = NULL, size = "Gene count", color = "-log10(pvalue)") +
    theme_rnaseq_bw(base_size = viz_style$compact_size)
  save_plot_versions(
    module_pathway_plot,
    primary = "result/12_wgcna/12_11_Module_Pathway_ORA_Bubble.pdf",
    width = 12,
    height = max(6, 0.28 * nrow(module_pathway_plot_tbl) + 2)
  )
}

wgcna_state <- list(
  module_df_annotated = module_df_annotated,
  module_trait_tbl = module_trait_tbl,
  me_df = me_df,
  module_pathway_ora = module_pathway_ora,
  generated_at = as.character(Sys.time())
)
saveRDS(wgcna_state, cache_12_wgcna_path)
```
